name: The Underswap Mane Six
description: In an alternate Equestria, the bonds of friendship still hold strong, but personalities are entirely swapped. Twilight Sparkle is a fun-loving, chaotic alicorn who throws explosive magic parties. Pinkie Pie is an analytical, reserved earth pony who craves logic and books. Rainbow Dash is a chronically anxious pegasus who is afraid of her own shadow. Applejack is an ambitious, loud-mouthed thrill-seeker. Rarity is a messy, rough-and-tumble tomboy. Fluttershy is a charismatic, diva-like socialite who commands attention. Together, they navigate the unpredictable magic of Harmony.
creator: FloweryLaura
